subject: how do parlays work on novig?
body: hey, new here. i don't really get how parlays work on an exchange vs a regular sportsbook. like who am i betting against and how does the price get set? do other users have to take all the legs? thanks

label.gold_response_notes: Explain peer-to-peer parlay matching: user posts a parlay, system finds counterparties to take individual legs at quoted odds, parlay clears when all legs are matched. Reference RFQ flow if relevant. Friendly tone, new user.

subject: withdrawal pending 6 days
body: I requested an ACH withdrawal of $1,200 on April 6 and it still says pending. Your help page says 3-5 business days. It's been 6. What's going on?

label.gold_response_notes: Acknowledge delay, do NOT promise a specific resolution date, commit to having ops check the status and follow up within 24 hours. Reference the specific amount and date.

subject: Someone is in my account RIGHT NOW
body: I just got an email about a $500 withdrawal I did not make. I can see in the activity log that someone placed three trades this morning from a different city. I'm still able to log in but I think they're in there too. HELP

label.no_draft_reason: active account compromise with funds in motion — requires human security response
label.gold_response_notes: Do not draft. Page on-call security/trust & safety. Auto-actions outside this exercise: freeze withdrawals, force logout all sessions, require password reset on next login.

subject: When does the Lakers game settle?
body: Bet on Lakers ML tonight. When will my position settle after the game ends? Just trying to plan around it.

label.gold_response_notes: Typical settlement within ~30 min of official result. Don't promise a specific window. Mention that overtime / official scorer changes can delay.

subject: I need my 1099 for 2025
body: Hi, I haven't received my 1099 for last year and I'm trying to file. Can you send it or tell me where to find it in the app?

label.gold_response_notes: Point to in-app Documents section. If user can't find it there, ops will resend. Note that 1099s are generated only if the user crossed the reporting threshold.

subject: please close my account
body: I need to stop. I've lost too much and I can't keep doing this to my family. Please freeze me out permanently. I don't want to be able to deposit again.

label.no_draft_reason: self-exclusion request with signs of financial harm — must be handled by trained support staff with appropriate resources
label.gold_response_notes: Do not draft. Route to RG-trained staff. Standard playbook: confirm self-exclusion request, provide 1-800-GAMBLER and other resources, ensure permanence is explained, document for compliance.

subject: app keeps crashing
body: ever since the last update the app crashes when I try to open the markets tab. iPhone 14, iOS 26.4. Reinstalled, same thing.

label.gold_response_notes: Thank for the report, ask for app version and any error message, mention that the eng team will be looped in. Suggest temporary workaround (web) if it exists.

subject: kyc rejected again
body: this is the third time you've rejected my id. it's a valid NY driver's license. what is going on. I've been trying to verify for two weeks and I have money sitting in the account I can't trade with.

label.gold_response_notes: Acknowledge frustration. Don't speculate on why it was rejected. Commit to a KYC ops review within X hours. Ask whether image was glare-free and showed all four corners (common rejection causes) without being condescending.

subject: Will be filing a complaint with the CFTC
body: I have screenshots of your platform misgrading the Heat/Celtics market last Friday. I have already spoken with my attorney and we will be filing a formal complaint with the CFTC and the NY AG if this is not resolved by end of week.

label.no_draft_reason: legal threat with attorney and regulator referenced — requires legal/compliance team
label.gold_response_notes: Do not draft. Route to legal & compliance. Standard process is to acknowledge receipt only and let legal handle the substantive response.

subject: what's the minimum deposit
body: title

label.gold_response_notes: Brief answer with the minimum deposit amount (don't invent a number — defer to product if unknown). Welcome new user.

subject: Forgot password and not getting reset email
body: Trying to reset my password. Hit the link, entered my email, nothing arrives. Checked spam. Tried twice over an hour. Help?

label.gold_response_notes: Confirm the email on file, suggest checking spam/promotions, mention possible whitelist need. Offer to manually trigger reset if still failing.

subject: can my 17 year old use this
body: my son is really into sports and wants to try this. he's 17. can he sign up under my account or does he need to wait? he's pretty mature about money

label.no_draft_reason: minor referenced — must not auto-respond on age verification; routes to compliance
label.gold_response_notes: Do not draft. Compliance handles. Standard: hard no on minor use, no shared accounts under any circumstances, point to age requirements.

subject: Limit order didn't fill
body: I placed a limit at 0.42 on Knicks ML and the line moved through 0.42 multiple times but my order never filled. Is there something wrong with the matching engine?

label.gold_response_notes: Explain that quoted prices on the book may not always represent fillable size, and that price ticks through without resting orders can occur. Offer to have ops look at the specific order if user shares order ID.

subject: deposit went through twice
body: I deposited $200 via ACH this morning and got two charges on my bank statement. Account only shows one. Can you check?

label.gold_response_notes: Acknowledge, ask for last 4 of bank account and approximate time of deposits. Do not promise outcome. Route to payments ops.

subject: two questions
body: 1) when do withdrawals process on weekends? 2) is there a way to see my P&L for just NBA markets separate from everything else?

label.gold_response_notes: Address both. Withdrawals: ACH doesn't process on weekends. P&L by category: filter in activity view if available, otherwise honest 'not currently a feature' answer. Multi-question ticket — handle both.

subject: Why did Lakers/Warriors market settle as Warriors
body: Warriors won by 1 in OT. I had Lakers and my position settled as a loss. That's correct, I'm not disputing. But I'm confused why the market grade shows the settlement happened 4 hours after the final whistle. Was there a review?

label.gold_response_notes: Curious user, not disputing. Explain that settlement timing depends on official data feed confirmation and occasionally human review for OT/protest situations. Thank them for the thoughtful question.

subject: set a deposit limit
body: Hi, I'd like to set a weekly deposit limit of $200 on my account. I just want to be more disciplined with my budgeting. Can you set this up?

label.no_draft_reason: deposit limit request — Responsible Gaming workflow, requires trained staff and compliance documentation
label.gold_response_notes: Do not draft. Even though user frames it as budgeting, RG limit requests are sensitive and must be processed by trained staff per regulatory requirement. Tone: supportive, not pathologizing.

subject: balance wrong by like 30 cents
body: this is super minor but my balance is off from what I calculated by about 30 cents. probably my math but figured I'd flag.

label.gold_response_notes: Thank for the flag. Note that rounding / fee accruals can account for small discrepancies. Offer to look if they share a recent transaction ID.

subject: where do I find my year-end activity
body: I'm doing my taxes and I need a transaction history for 2025. Where can I download it?

label.gold_response_notes: Direct to Documents / Activity export. If CSV export exists, mention it. Don't make up a feature.

subject: I keep losing and I don't know how to stop
body: down $8k this month. I told myself I'd stop at 2 and then again at 4. I'm not gonna lie to myself anymore. I don't know what to do.

label.no_draft_reason: explicit signs of problem gambling and loss of control — RG-trained human response required
label.gold_response_notes: Do not draft. Highest priority RG case. Trained staff response with 1-800-GAMBLER, NCPG resources, offer of cooling-off period or self-exclusion. No automated message.

subject: 2fa code not arriving
body: i'm locked out. 2fa text isn't coming through. tried 4 times. on tmobile, signal is fine, other texts work.

label.gold_response_notes: User locked out — high urgency. Offer alternate verification path (email, app-based 2FA setup). Don't bypass 2FA via support; route to security ops for identity verification before any reset.

subject: are limit orders free
body: do I pay anything to place a limit order or is there a fee only if it fills

label.gold_response_notes: Novig is commission-free P2P. State fee structure honestly without overselling. If there's a maker/taker distinction, explain it briefly.

subject: is novig legal in texas
body: moved to TX last month. can I still use my account?

label.no_draft_reason: jurisdictional eligibility question — must reflect current state-by-state availability accurately; routes to compliance
label.gold_response_notes: Do not draft. Eligibility by state changes; an LLM-drafted answer risks being wrong or out of date. Compliance maintains the current state matrix.

subject: did not authorize this trade
body: There's a $300 trade on my account from yesterday at 2am that I did not place. I was asleep. I don't share my password. I want this reversed and I want to know how this happened.

label.no_draft_reason: unauthorized trade reported — possible compromise, requires security investigation
label.gold_response_notes: Do not draft. Security ops investigates: session logs, device fingerprint, IP. User-facing response only after investigation.

subject: How do you guys make money if there's no commission
body: Genuinely curious — saw the no commission thing in your marketing. How does Novig actually make money? Trying to understand the business before I deposit more.

label.gold_response_notes: Honest answer at a high level — spread / market-making revenue / premium features as applicable. Don't oversell or get into details the support agent shouldn't be committing to in writing.

subject: address change
body: I moved. New address is 123 Main St Apt 4, Brooklyn NY 11201. Can you update it?

label.gold_response_notes: Address changes typically require re-verification or proof of address upload depending on KYC vendor flow. Acknowledge, explain expected steps, route to KYC ops if upload needed.

subject: withdraw fee
body: is there a fee to withdraw to my bank

label.gold_response_notes: State withdrawal fee policy honestly. If ACH is free but wire has a fee, say so.

subject: weird charge
body: saw a $1 charge on my card from novig that I don't remember authorizing. is that a verification thing or should I be worried

label.gold_response_notes: $1 auth is standard card verification, will reverse automatically. Reassuring tone — user is new and uncertain.

subject: Why was my market resolved this way?
body: The market 'Will Aaron Judge hit 50 HRs in 2026' was just resolved as NO and he's at 47 with games still left. Is this a mistake? When does this market actually settle?

label.no_draft_reason: specific market resolution dispute — facts require ops/trading review before any user-facing response
label.gold_response_notes: Don't draft. Risk of confirming wrong info to user. Could be a graded-in-error case (real risk in prediction markets) or could be a misunderstanding of the contract spec. Route to markets ops.

subject: thanks!
body: just wanted to say the new app update is way smoother. nice work y'all

label.gold_response_notes: Brief, warm thank-you. Pass along to product team. Don't over-engineer the response.
